title: rubus niveus var. pedunculosus
intro: Rubus niveus var. pedunculosus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or white bramble, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region and parts of China. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus niveus var. pedunculosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
